uses_ernie_note: algorithmic mask generation + PIL compositing; no diffusion model in the critical path

bitmask_convention.corner_dependency_rule: a corner bit is normalized to 0 unless BOTH its adjacent edge bits are set — this collapses 256 raw combinations to 47 canonical tiles
bitmask_convention.reference: Godot auto_tile_coord, GameMaker autotile, RPG Maker VX autotile — all use this 47-tile Wang-corner scheme

mask_source: algorithmically rendered via PIL.ImageDraw at build time (see postprocess.write_all_masks)
output_naming: mask_<bitmask>.png  (bitmask value 0-255 in 3-digit zero-padded form; only 47 values in the valid set)

ernie_call_count.note: no ERNIE calls — this workflow is pure algorithmic
